input.headline: Best laptop Black Friday 2025 deals, picked by a tech expert

raw.headline: Best laptop Black Friday 2025 deals, picked by a tech expert

winner: Why did the laptop break up with its Black Friday deal? It said, "You're just not my type—you're too *screen* for me.

candidates.text: I asked the tech expert which laptop was the best Black Friday deal and he handed me a charred piece of aluminum saying, "This one is literally the best because it's the only one left after the fire.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific, visual joke that ties back to the headline."}

candidates.text: I asked an AI to pick the best Black Friday laptop deal, and it recommended one that can't tell jokes—turns out it's overfitted on my humorless dataset.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Smart wordplay with AI and overfitting, ties back to the headline's tech expert angle, concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: I asked my laptop for advice on Black Friday shopping, and it said, "Don't trust any deal that doesn't come with a free upgrade... to a desktop.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with tech-related humor, concise and specific to the context."}

candidates.text: I bought a laptop on Black Friday 2025 based on a tech expert's recommendation—now my computer is literally the best, and I'm still waiting for the "picked by" part to show up.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on the headline with a relatable tech purchase scenario, concise and specific with a clever punchline."}
